commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Policy plugin sandbox posture config conformance checks, agent-scoped sandbox overlays, focused tests, and policy docs for mode, backend, Docker, and browser posture.

PR surface: Source +1853, Tests +1411, Docs +338. Total +3602 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection shows `collectPolicyEvidence` now includes `sandboxPosture` by default while the initial evaluation call does not disable it, and the duplicate docs headings are visible in the PR head file. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair can restore opt-in sandbox evidence and remove the duplicate docs block; maintainer approval of the public Policy contract remains separate.

commands.author: giodl73-repo
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway device-handshake field bounds, device-identity shape prechecks, a device-signature auth-rate-limit scope in the WebSocket connect path, regression tests, a PoC script, and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +153, Tests +456, Docs +1, Other +341. Total +951 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection plus the PR's PoC description gives a high-confidence reproduction path for current main: forged device handshakes can reach deriveDeviceIdFromPublicKey and v3/v2 signature verification before any device-signature limiter. I did not run the PoC because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are narrow, mechanical gateway-auth repairs that an automated fix lane can attempt before maintainer/security re-review.
